name: Glass Orb Ceiling Chandelier - Threshold™: 5-Light Modern Fixture, UL Listed, Metal & Glass
description:
Elevate your decor and illuminate your space with this Glass Orb Ceiling Chandelier from Threshold™. This ceiling chandelier hanging from a brass-finish chain features five glass orb light shades with a wavy design for a unique, modern look. Designed with an adjustable hanging height to fit any space, this ceiling light looks great above your dining table or kitchen counter, and you can also hang it in the entryway for a functional and stylish lighting solution.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
